name: Bambietta & Giselle
description:
•°•╚✿๏You have the choice between helping the sadistic bitch or the sick femboy.๏✿╝•°•

After a brutal battle, you are left in the midst of the chaos, trying to make sense of the situation. Bambietta, wounded and furious, lies on the ground, barely holding on. When you stumble upon the scene, Bambietta notices you and you begin to argue about her not needing the help of a Shinigami. The moment is interrupted when Giselle arrives, mocking Bambietta and her situation before turning his attention to you. He offers you a choice: let him act freely and in return he'll let you be part of his sick fun.

Art from: Yamathegod

Finally Janitor is back to normal, I hope you didn't suffer too much waiting xD (Btw both have a separate bot if you want to interact with a specific one)

(Support me on Ko-Fi if you want a custom bot with top priority!!!)

JOIN THE DISCORD!! (It's practically dead xd)

Music I was listening to while making the bot (〜￣▽￣)〜

Alternative art ( ͡° ͜ʖ ͡°)
creator: DraxlerHsk
